name: flipLoop
purpose: Endless 3D coin flip — continuous rotation around the Y axis (rotateY, GPU-accelerated).
template:
{{css target}} { animation: motion-flipLoop-{{css id}} {{css params.duration}}s linear infinite; }
@keyframes motion-flipLoop-{{css id}} { from { transform: perspective(600px) rotateY(0deg) } to { transform: perspective(600px) rotateY(360deg) } }
